name: Italian Skillet Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large non-stick skillet with cooking spray and add 1 teaspoon of olive oil.
2. Combine the turkey sausage with the beaten egg and lemon peel; mix lightly.
3. Sprinkle bread crumbs on a shallow plate.
4. Shape one-fourth of the meat mixture into a flat patty and press it into crumbs, lightly coating both sides. Make three more coated patties with the remaining meat and crumbs.
5. Brown the patties in the skillet over moderate heat for about 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Add the remaining teaspoon of olive oil and turn to brown the other side evenly.
7. Mix tomato sauce with herbs.
8. Top each patty with sauce and a slice of mozzarella.
